{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/63083086?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/brodmart", "id": 63083086, "login": "brodmart", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjYzMDgzMDg2", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/brodmart", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44023", "cvss": {"score": 8.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 8.6, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:L/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-22", "name": "Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-918", "name": "Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)"}], "description": "### Impact
In versions `>= 1.5.0, < 2.74.1`, `docling-core` did not sufficiently restrict remote request destinations and could resolve a server-provided `Content-Disposition` to a local path in an unsafe manner.

In applications that accept untrusted URLs, this could allow SSRF attacks targeting local files outside the user-defined cache directory.

### Patches
Patched in `docling-core` `2.74.1`.
The fix adds stricter validation for remote destinations and normalizes server-provided filenames before use.

Users should upgrade to:
- `docling-core` `>= 2.74.1`

### Workarounds
If upgrading is not immediately possible, avoid passing untrusted URLs into remote fetch functionality.

### References
- Fix release: [`v2.74.1`](https://github.com/docling-project/docling-core/releases/tag/v2.74.1)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00286, "percentile": 0.20546}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jmmv-h3mp-59v8", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-03T21:16:25Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jmmv-h3mp-59v8", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jmmv-h3mp-59v8"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44023"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-03T21:16:25Z", "references": ["https://github.com/docling-project/docling-core/security/advisories/GHSA-jmmv-h3mp-59v8", "https://github.com/docling-project/docling-core/releases/tag/v2.74.1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jmmv-h3mp-59v8"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/docling-project/docling-core/security-advisories/GHSA-jmmv-h3mp-59v8", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/docling-project/docling-core", "summary": "Docling Core: Unsafe remote filename resolution", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-03T21:16:26Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jmmv-h3mp-59v8", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.74.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "docling-core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.5.0, < 2.74.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Docling Core: Unsafe remote filename resolution
